title: Orleanesia pleurostachys
taxonomy: Orleanesia pleurostachys is a species of orchid native to Brazil. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Orleanesia is part of the subtribe Zygopelmatinae, which is a subtribe of the tribe Cranichideae. The classification of Orleanesia pleurostachys places it within the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. The specific classification of the plant can also be detailed down to its kingdom and order, with Orleanesia pleurostachys belonging to the kingdom Plantae and the order Asparagales.
